response: siragama tri  gurmukh kripa kare bhagati ki jai bin gu r bhagati n hoey  apae ap mila ae boozhai ta nirmal hoave soey  hari jeeu saachaa saachi baani sabad milaave hooey 1  bhai re bhagati hien kahe jagi aia  pure gu r kie sev keine birthaa janam guavaia 1  rahau  apae jagajivan sukhdaata apae baksim mila ae  jeeay janta ae kia vecheara kia ko aakhaae suuna ae  gurmukh apae deey vadaai apae sev karaae 2  dekh ki kutambu moohi lohbaana chaldaia naal na jai  sat guru sev gi gun niidhan paai tis die keem na paai  hari prabhu sakha meit prabhu mer aante hoey sakhaai  apnaai man citi khaae khaae bin gu r ap ne jai  hari jeeu daata bhagati vchal hai kari kirpa man ni vasaai  nank sooba surti deey prabhu apae gurmukh de vadiaaei 4 15 48  ***  gene language spirit visit  lower case words appear at most three times  all sentences connected with hyphens  no spaces between them
